sense.

believe there's 15 for now, but once we get that automation set up, as soon as new ones are populated, we'll kind of just push those through.

I've.

Um, it could be something where we introduce new images, um, which is another pipeline that we're looking to get set up to do, like, more diagrams versus just the infographics that we've previously done.
Yeah, one thing I have in mind is, uh, interlinking with write anchor text, um, kind of keywords or long term, like long form search queries.
We can do interlinking.

We have done that before.
If you want to take that, just let us know, or we can also take care of that.
Yeah, I think I can talk to Joe.

I think we've targeted, at least for the data engineering resources, we can target like the data engineering resources subfolder and like interlink, have it find articles that make sense and do that way.
So now that we've got at least enough depth on the agentic of, you know, 25 or so articles.
We can start to interlink between those as well.

Yep.
Yep.

Yeah, I'll get it.
I think we've been pretty good on content, so I think there's, you know, I don't, it's fine if we get them next week.
Okay, wonderful.
We'll have the next two articles for you later today, so I'll share those in Slack when they're ready.
And then the content calendar, I think...
We got a few new topics, and I don't know if we have enough kind of source material from our previous conversations with Michelle and Jean to kind of backfill these.

Like, we can let the LLM obviously do its thing, but I think we have a lot of context on the previous articles, just from, like, the product deep dive that we did and the interview that I did with Michelle.
Is there anybody on the team or even you, Kershaw, that would be able to talk through these at a high level and just give us a little bit more kind of context to work off of?
think it's probably me who would have to give you that stuff.

Answer your key questions around these things.

Like, I think it would just be more helpful if you just give me a doc with a couple questions or, like, some information you need, and I could just fill that out pretty quickly because I could just use, like, I could just use our knowledge base and stuff like that to quickly fill that out with our internal AI stuff.
Yeah, I'll at least send what we've been using as, like, the briefs that we create from all the contexts we had and just see if you can kind of fill out the brief.
If not, we can just jump on, like, a quick call, and I can poke around in your brain, and we can use your AI to come up with some additional contexts.
That works.
Yeah, let me fill out the brief.
If you have more questions, we can have a call, and I can walk through them.
Okay, awesome.
Sounds good.

Anything else top of mind?

Yeah.

That's what I'm asking.
Oh, yeah.
So I think based off just the direction of

Yes.
So there we just add only new competitors, which are basically, I can show you the list.
If you don't have, just let me know if you need any.
I think you have, like, yeah, you can show me what you have.
I'll show you what I set up in scrunch this morning.
We'll see if we're missing any.

I've got these six right now.
Yeah, these are fine.
Okay.

Yeah, just this morning, so it'll take a while.
Offer it to populate.
I see.
But yeah, I added the key topics that you sent over with those.
And then I don't know if there's any additional prompts you guys are tracking in profound outside of just the ones based off the articles.
Yeah, there are a few prompts also.
You want those?
Yeah, I might as well, while I'm updating it, we can just populate it with everything.
Okay, Nithin, just share the other, like, just add another tab beside the same sheet.
Cool.

Oh, okay.
Yeah, so we'll try to get you guys access as soon as it's ready.

So,

Yes.
Okay, cool.
Makes sense.
Sounds good.

right, guys.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content production, analytics, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Production:** On track, with 50 TLDR refreshes complete. A new diagram for a thought leadership article is the only blocker; it will be a branded, simplified version of an existing internal diagram.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Agent Pages:** The template is now editable (prompt & entity sections), unblocking the workflow for 15 Agent Connector pages. The workflow will be tested with a single page first.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Traffic Analytics:** New HockeyStack data shows traffic is growing (\~1.2–1.3x) from new audience acquisition, not repeat users—a positive early signal. Nithin will audit Google Search Console (GSC) data to find low-performing pages for optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**CheckThat.ai Platform:** The platform is being updated with Agentic competitors and prompts. Airbyte will act as a design partner, providing feedback to shape the tool's development.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Analytics & Engagement

  - [**HockeyStack Data:** Access granted, providing granular session vs. unique visitor data.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [**Finding:** Traffic growth (\~1.2–1.3x) is driven by new audience acquisition, a positive early signal.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Google Search Console (GSC) Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Action (Nithin):** Pull GSC data (impressions, clicks) for all Agentic articles to identify low-performing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**Goal:** Optimize these pages (add content, backlinks) to increase visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Problem:** Low engagement on some pages (e.g., "document chunking").](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Action (Erik):** Discuss new engagement tactics with Kyle (e.g., new image formats).](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Suggestion (Tanmay):** Implement programmatic interlinking with relevant anchor text to improve SEO and user flow.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Thought Leadership Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [**Blocker:** A diagram is needed for one section.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [**Guidance (Kushal):** Use an existing internal diagram as a basis, but simplify it for a generic audience by removing Airbyte-specific connectors.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**New Content Briefs:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**Need:** More context from Airbyte to write new articles, as existing source material is insufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**Action (Erik):** Send content briefs to Kushal for completion.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Action (Kushal):** Fill out the briefs; schedule a follow-up call if more context is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Image Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**Finding:** Agent image sizes were unexpectedly large (3MB), now compressed to \~50KB.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**Action (Nithin):** Audit all images to ensure proper compression.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**Action (Joe):** Check image sizes on TLDR articles during the refresh process.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

### New Initiatives

  - [**Agent Connectors:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Status:** Template is now editable (prompt & entity sections), unblocking the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**Plan:** Test the workflow with a single page before automating the remaining 14.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Agent Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [**Status:** Wireframe is in review; feedback will be incorporated before sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [**Plan:** Develop the wireframe and template before building the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**CheckThat.ai Platform:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Status:** Platform is being updated with new Agentic competitors and prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Action (Nithin):** Add other Airbyte prompts to the shared sheet for inclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [**Plan:** Provide Airbyte with access soon to act as a design partner and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [Get the thought leadership diagram from the designer.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [Send content briefs to Kushal.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [Test the Agent Connector workflow with one page.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Provide Airbyte with CheckThat.ai access when ready.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [**Kushal:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [Complete the content briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Nithin:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [Audit all images for compression.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [Pull GSC data for the Agentic content audit.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Add other Airbyte prompts to the shared sheet.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [**Joe:**](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [Check image sizes on TLDR articles during refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/RcGxpD3u_-9_pY7YxBRki63MRgvD4SaF?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

action_items.description: Build/test Agent Connectors workflow on 1 page; share w/ Tanmay
Notify Kirkland re: Entity/Prompt sections now editable
Update GitHub repo w/ latest Agent Connectors template changes
Pull GSC impressions/clicks for agency data articles; share w/ Erik
Blend GSC clicks into Looker dashboard
Draft/share 2-3 diagram options for TL article w/ Erik
Share 2 new TL articles in Slack to Tanmay/kushal
Send content briefs to Kushal; then Kushal complete briefs
Add new tab to prompts sheet w/ Profound prompts; share w/ Erik
Finish data engineering resource articles; update Nithin on list
